overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, featuring tall trees, undergrowth, and a narrow dirt path winding through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously along the narrow dirt path, sweeping the flashlight beam across the trail ahead to navigate the dark forest

entered.detail: thick tree trunks with textured bark lining the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the forest floor
tall grass and low vegetation covering the forest ground
large boulders and rocky outcroppings visible in the distance among the trees

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a dense forest at night, illuminated only by a warm flashlight beam. Tall trees flank a narrow dirt path while grass and undergrowth fill the spaces between trunks. In the distance, rock formations become visible as the path winds deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense nocturnal forest that gradually reveals rugged geological features. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness, illuminating a narrow dirt path flanked by towering trees. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the light catches the thick grass and undergrowth filling the spaces between the trunks. The scene then opens up as the path winds further inward, finally bringing distant rock formations into view against the blackness of the night.
